data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Royalty tracking per booking (6% to franchisor)', but the evidence does not confirm that this tracking is implemented or verified. The provided evidence includes booking details but lacks any specific information or endpoints that demonstrate the calculation or distribution of royalties. This indicates a gap in the requirement satisfaction as there is no evidence of the royalty tracking mechanism in place.
gaps: No evidence of royalty tracking mechanism or calculation for the 6% royalty to franchisor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for royalty calculation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the royalty of 6% is calculated and tracked per booking.
